THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: FINAL JUDGMENT IN THIS MATTER IS HEREBY ENTERED IN CONFORMITY WITH THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND THIS COURT'S ORDER GRANTING FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES, COSTS, ADMINISTRATION FEES AND PLAINTIFF'S ENHANCEMENT. THIS JUDGMENT IS A FINAL DISPOSITION OF THE ABOVE-CAPTIONED ACTION IN ITS ENTIRETY. AS REQUIRED BY CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.769(H), THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER THE PARTIES TO ENCFORCE THE TERMS OF THIS JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

LAW AND MOTION 302, COUNSEL FOR PARTIES REPRESENT TO THE COURT THAT THEY ARE NOT AWARE OF ANY OPT-OUTS TO THE SETTLEMENT OR ANY OBJECTIONS TO THE SETTLEMENT HAVING BEEN FILED. THE COURT CONFIRMS THAT THERE IS NO ONE PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM TODAY WISHING TO OBJECT TO THE SETTLEMENT. THE MATTER IS SUBMITTED. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF IVETTE POOL'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, FINAL CERTIFICATION OF SETTLEMENT CLASS, AND FINAL JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT APPROVES THE ENHANCEMENT AWARD REQUEST AND THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. FORMAL ORDER SIGNED. SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/HK)

Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. ARLO URIATE, ESQ. of Liberation Law Group, P.C. (Tel: 415-695-1000) appearing for plaintiff Ivette Pool;
Atty. RODERICK P. BUSHNELL, ESQ. of Law Offices of Roderick P. Bushnell (Tel: 415-217-3800) appearing for International School of Pizza, Inc. dba Tony's Pizza Napoletana.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. Counsel for parties represent to the Court that they are not aware of any opt-outs to the settlement or any objections to the settlement having been filed. The Court confirms that there is no one present in the courtroom today wishing to object to the settlement. The matter is submitted. The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff Ivette Pool's Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement, Final Certification of Settlement Class, and Final Judgment is granted. The Court approves the enhancement award request and the request for attorney's fees and costs.

FORMAL ORDER SIGNED. SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/HK)
